sc.dei.s: Published DEI report 2023; HRC Corporate Equality Index score 100 (2022-2024).
sc.environment.s: No verified science-based emissions targets or EPA enforcement on record.
sc.labor.s: No NLRB unfair labor findings or OSHA fatalities on record.
sc.charity.s: Shopify.com Foundation donated $32M (2020-2023); committed 1% of equity post-IPO.
sc.animals.s: Not applicable; software platform without animal testing or product lines.
sc.guns.s: Does not manufacture or retail firearms.
sc.privacy.s: No FTC enforcement actions; privacy policy available; breach history not documented.
sc.execPay.s: CEO-to-median-worker ratio not publicly disclosed; cannot verify.
